pages.title: Pricing Strategy
pages.content: Authority AI uses tiered pricing: Starter at $99/month for early-stage teams, Growth at $249/month for scaling startups, and Enterprise with custom pricing for larger organizations. Annual plans receive a 15% discount.

pages.title: Current Runway
pages.content: Current runway is 14 months based on $180k monthly burn and $2.5M cash on hand. Finance reviewed this on June 20, 2026.

pages.title: Hiring Plan
pages.content: Q3 hiring plan: 1 senior backend engineer, 1 solutions engineer, and 1 customer success manager. Headcount budget approved through September.

pages.title: Engineering Blockers
pages.content: Current engineering blocker is completing the Notion integration and unifying the refresh engine before adding OAuth connectors.

pages.title: Customer Feedback
pages.content: Most common customer objection is concern about onboarding time and whether the Company Brain can stay current without manual updates.

pages.title: ICP
pages.content: Ideal customer profile is seed to Series A B2B SaaS founders with 5-50 employees who need a schema-first company brain for decision infrastructure.

pages.title: Product Roadmap
pages.content: Q3 roadmap priorities: Notion integration, decision recommendations, Slack connector, and authority conflict resolution. Q4 focus is OAuth connectors and refresh automation.

pages.title: Fundraising Notes
pages.content: Fundraising target is $4M seed extension at a $25M cap. Active conversations with 3 lead investors. Target close in August 2026.
